mapper.select: with recursive category as ( select id,parent_id,name,status,description from book_category where parent_id = #{parentId} union all select a.id,a.parent_id,a.name,a.status,a.description from book_category a inner join category b on a.parent_id = b.id) select id,parent_id,status,description,name from category order by parent_id,id
